briefdescription.para: signal about points selection changing, triggered in selectPoints
signal about points or normals changing, triggered in setDirtyFlag
default value for maximum rendered points number
recommended value for maximum rendered points number to disable discretization
signal about render discretization changing, triggered in setRenderDiscretization
size of point in pixels
auxiliary parameter to avoid recalculation in every frame
scale object size (all point positions)
does the object have any visual representation (visible points, triangles, edges, etc.), no considering child objects

detaileddescription.para: does the object have any model available (but possibly empty), e.g. ObjectMesh has valid mesh() or ObjectPoints has valid pointCloud()

briefdescription.para: reinterpret_cast to avoid making a copy of shared_ptr

simplesect.para: the pair ( point cloud, selected points ) if any point is selected or full point cloud otherwise

detaileddescription.para: clones this object only, without its children, making new object the owner of all copied resources
clones this object only, without its children, making new object to share resources with this object

sets some dirty flags for the object (to force its visual update)
mask
is a union of DirtyFlags flags
invalidateCaches
whether to automatically invalidate model caches (pass false here if you manually update the caches)

briefdescription.para: gets current selected points
sets current selected points
swaps current selected points with the argument
returns selected points if any, otherwise returns all valid points
returns colors of selected vertices
sets colors of selected vertices
set all object solid colors (front/back/etc.) from other object for all viewports
Returns true if this class supports the property type. Otherwise passing it to the functions below is illegal.
returns per-point colors of the object
sets per-point colors of the object
swaps per-point colors of the object with given argument
copies point colors from given source object
get all visualize properties masks
returns mask of viewports where given property is set
sets size of points on screen in pixels
returns size of points on screen in pixels

simplesect.para: this ctor is public only for std::make_shared used inside clone()

detaileddescription.para: returns cached bounding box of this point object in world coordinates; if you need bounding box in local coordinates please call getBoundingBox()

briefdescription.para: returns cached information about the number of valid points
returns cached information about the number of selected points
returns the amount of memory this object occupies on heap

detaileddescription.para: returns rendering discretization display each renderDiscretization-th point only, starting from 0 index, total number is numRenderingValidPoints() \detail defined by maximum rendered points number as: numValidPoints() / getMaxRenderingPoints() (rounded up) updated when setting maxRenderingPoints or changing the cloud (setting DIRTY_FACE flag)

briefdescription.para: returns count of valid points that will be rendered

detaileddescription.para: returns maximal number of points that will be rendered if actual count of valid points is greater then the points will be sampled

sets maximal number of points that will be rendered
getRenderDiscretization, MaxRenderingPointsDefault, MaxRenderingPointsUnlimited

briefdescription.para: returns overriden file extension used to serialize point cloud inside this object, nullptr means defaultSerializePointsFormat()

detaileddescription.para: overrides file extension used to serialize point cloud inside this object: must start from '.', nullptr means serialize in defaultSerializePointsFormat()

briefdescription.para: reset basic object colors to their default values from the current theme
reset all object colors to their default values from the current theme

detaileddescription.para: swaps signals, used in swap function to return back signals after swapBase_ pls call Parent::swapSignals_ first when overriding this function

briefdescription.para: swaps this object with other

memberdef.definition: virtual MRMESH_API Expected< std::future< Expected< void > > > MR::ObjectPointsHolder::serializeModel_
memberdef.name: serializeModel_

detaileddescription.para: Creates future to save object model (e.g. mesh) in given file path is full filename without extension

briefdescription.para: Reads model from file.

detaileddescription.para:
Write parameters to given Json::Value,
if you override this method, please call Base::serializeFields_(root) in the beginning

Reads parameters from json value
if you override this method, please call Base::deserializeFields_(root) in the beginning
each renderable child of VisualObject should implement this method and assign renderObj_ inside

briefdescription.para: set all visualize properties masks
this is private function to set default colors of this type (ObjectPointsHolder) in constructor only
set default scene-related properties
update renderDiscretization_ as numValidPoints_ / maxRenderingPoints_ (rounded up)

detaileddescription.para: an object that stores a points
